body: Omar, great catching up with you last week — I wanted to follow up on a few things we discussed before the weekend slipped away entirely. I've been thinking more about the [Verdant Grid](startups/verdant-grid) opportunity and I do think your read on the team's go-to-market gap is spot on; they're technically exceptional but the commercial motion needs real scaffolding before we'd feel comfortable leading the round. That said, I'd love to get your honest take on whether the founding team is coachable on that front, given you've spent more time with them than I have. On the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) side, we're also kicking off our LP update cycle next month and I'd love to loop you in as an advisor voice if you're open to it — even a short call with a couple of our LPs would carry real weight. Let me know what your schedule looks like in early June and we can find something that works.
